business_fit.reason: Clean brandable .com with confirmed regular Dynadot pricing, no DNS, no archive sample, and direct fit for the patent data site.

domain_reputation.assessment: Clean first-pass signals. Final registrar availability, premium status, and manual blacklist/trademark checks are still required immediately before purchase.

adsense_domain_fit.assessment: Brandable, short, no hyphen or digits, trusted .com TLD, and no obvious policy-sensitive wording.

search_growth_fit.market: Korea-facing patent intelligence with room for English/global expansion
strengths: Patent keyword is clear in English.
Gogo matches the Korean site name while remaining easy to type.
Domain can support data tools, rankings, guides, and editorial content.
risks: Patent topic is expert-heavy, so content must cite sources and avoid legal-advice claims.

business_operations_fit.registration_price_reference: Dynadot production API search confirmed patentgogo.com available, Registration Price: 10.88 in USD, Renewal price: 10.88 in USD, Domain is not a Premium Domain.
business_operations_fit.account_balance_reference: Dynadot production account balance checked as 82.02 USD.
required_ops_before_live: Confirm Dynadot final all-in price and premium status.
Confirm Dynadot production account, account balance or payment method, 2FA, recovery email, and domain lock.
Add patentgogo.com and www.patentgogo.com to the target Vercel project.
Verify HTTPS certificate, apex redirect, www redirect, sitemap, robots.txt, ads.txt, and canonical URLs.

backlink_trust.assessment: Treat as a clean new brand domain, not an aged/backlink purchase.

blockers: DYNADOT_API_KEY is available via D:\env\dynadot-keys.txt, but live purchase requires fresh final confirmation in chat.
No final confirmation was provided with exact domain, max price/currency, duration, and production account confirmation in one statement.
No Vercel project is linked in .vercel/project.json.
